message.content:
You are implementing Task 1: 后端项目脚手架

## Task Description

**Files:**
- Create: `exam-system/pom.xml`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/ExamApplication.java`
- Create: `exam-system/src/main/resources/application.yml`

**Steps:**
- **Step 1:** 创建 `pom.xml`，引入依赖：spring-boot-starter-web, spring-boot-starter-security, mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter, mysql-connector, jjwt (io.jsonwebtoken), lombok, spring-boot-starter-test
- **Step 2:** 创建 `ExamApplication.java` 启动类
- **Step 3:** 创建 `application.yml`，配置 MySQL 数据源、JWT secret/expiration、OAuth2 client 参数（client-id, client-secret, authorization-uri, token-uri, user-info-uri）、CORS 允许的 origin
- **Step 4:** Commit `feat: init backend project scaffolding`

## Context

This is a brand-new exam system project. The working directory is `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/`. All backend files go under `exam-system/` subdirectory within this path. This is NOT a git repo, so skip the commit step.

The project uses:
- Java 17+ with Spring Boot 3.x
- MyBatis-Plus for ORM
- Spring Security for auth (JWT-based, OAuth2 client)
- MySQL as database

## Your Job

1. Create the directory structure and all 3 files with complete, working content
2. Use sensible defaults for application.yml placeholders (e.g., `${DB_HOST:localhost}`)
3. Make sure pom.xml uses compatible versions (Spring Boot 3.2.x + MyBatis-Plus 3.5.x)
4. Do NOT run mvn or try to compile - just create the files

Work from: D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/

## Report Format

When done, report:
- **Status:** DONE | DONE_WITH_CONCERNS | BLOCKED | NEEDS_CONTEXT
- What you implemented
- Files changed
- Any issues or concerns

content.text:
Translation of the task: "Create a backend project scaffold for an exam system, including pom.xml with dependencies, a Spring Boot application class, and application.yml with database/JWT/OAuth2/CORS configuration."

Let me create the directory structure and files.

data.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'git commit/push is globally prohibited.'})) if re.match(r'^git\s+(commit|push)', cmd, re.IGNORECASE) else None"

input.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<project xmlns="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0"
         xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"
         xsi:schemaLocation="http://maven.apache.org/POM/4.0.0 https://maven.apache.org/xsd/maven-4.0.0.xsd">
    <modelVersion>4.0.0</modelVersion>

    <parent>
        <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
        <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-parent</artifactId>
        <version>3.2.5</version>
        <relativePath/>
    </parent>

    <groupId>com.exam</groupId>
    <artifactId>exam-system</artifactId>
    <version>1.0.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
    <name>exam-system</name>
    <description>Exam System Backend</description>

    <properties>
        <java.version>17</java.version>
        <mybatis-plus.version>3.5.6</mybatis-plus.version>
        <jjwt.version>0.12.5</jjwt.version>
    </properties>

    <dependencies>
        <!-- Spring Boot Web -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-web</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Spring Security -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-security</artifactId>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MyBatis-Plus (Spring Boot 3.x) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.baomidou</groupId>
            <artifactId>mybatis-plus-spring-boot3-starter</artifactId>
            <version>${mybatis-plus.version}</version>
        </dependency>

        <!-- MySQL Connector -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>com.mysql</groupId>
            <artifactId>mysql-connector-j</artifactId>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- JWT (io.jsonwebtoken) -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-api</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-impl</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>io.jsonwebtoken</groupId>
            <artifactId>jjwt-jackson</artifactId>
            <version>${jjwt.version}</version>
            <scope>runtime</scope>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Lombok -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
            <optional>true</optional>
        </dependency>

        <!-- Test -->
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-boot-starter-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
        <dependency>
            <groupId>org.springframework.security</groupId>
            <artifactId>spring-security-test</artifactId>
            <scope>test</scope>
        </dependency>
    </dependencies>

    <build>
        <plugins>
            <plugin>
                <groupId>org.springframework.boot</groupId>
                <artifactId>spring-boot-maven-plugin</artifactId>
                <configuration>
                    <excludes>
                        <exclude>
                            <groupId>org.projectlombok</groupId>
                            <artifactId>lombok</artifactId>
                        </exclude>
                    </excludes>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>
        </plugins>
    </build>

</project>

server:
  port: ${SERVER_PORT:8080}

spring:
  datasource:
    url: jdbc:mysql://${DB_HOST:localhost}:${DB_PORT:3306}/${DB_NAME:exam_system}?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf-8&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&useSSL=false&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
    username: ${DB_USERNAME:root}
    password: ${DB_PASSWORD:root}
    driver-class-name: com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver

  security:
    oauth2:
      client:
        registration:
          default:
            client-id: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_ID:exam-client}
            client-secret: ${OAUTH2_CLIENT_SECRET:exam-secret}
            authorization-grant-type: authorization_code
            redirect-uri: "{baseUrl}/login/oauth2/code/{registrationId}"
            scope: openid,profile,email
        provider:
          default:
            authorization-uri: ${OAUTH2_AUTH_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/authorize}
            token-uri: ${OAUTH2_TOKEN_URI:http://localhost:9000/oauth2/token}
            user-info-uri: ${OAUTH2_USERINFO_URI:http://localhost:9000/userinfo}

# MyBatis-Plus
mybatis-plus:
  mapper-locations: classpath*:/mapper/**/*.xml
  configuration:
    map-underscore-to-camel-case: true
    log-impl: org.apache.ibatis.logging.stdout.StdOutImpl
  global-config:
    db-config:
      id-type: auto
      logic-delete-field: deleted
      logic-delete-value: 1
      logic-not-delete-value: 0

# JWT
jwt:
  secret: ${JWT_SECRET:YmFzZTY0LWVuY29kZWQtc2VjcmV0LWtleS1mb3ItZXhhbS1zeXN0ZW0tand0}
  expiration: ${JWT_EXPIRATION:86400000}

# CORS
cors:
  allowed-origins: ${CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS:http://localhost:5173,http://localhost:3000}

# Logging
logging:
  level:
    com.exam: debug

content.text:
---

**Status:** DONE

**What was implemented:**
- `pom.xml` with Spring Boot 3.2.5 parent, MyBatis-Plus 3.5.6, JJWT 0.12.5, MySQL connector, Spring Security, Lombok, and test dependencies. Lombok is excluded from the fat jar build.
- `ExamApplication.java` standard Spring Boot 3 startup class under `com.exam` package.
- `application.yml` with environment-variable-driven config for MySQL datasource, OAuth2 client (authorization-uri/token-uri/user-info-uri), JWT secret/expiration, CORS allowed origins, and MyBatis-Plus settings (camelCase mapping, logic delete, mapper locations).

**Files created:**
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/pom.xml`
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/java/com/exam/ExamApplication.java`
- `D:/project/pt-gitlab/exams/exam-system/src/main/resources/application.yml`

**Commit skipped** as this is not a git repo.

---

**中文总结：** 创建了考试系统后端脚手架，包含三个文件：pom.xml（Spring Boot 3.2.5 + MyBatis-Plus 3.5.6 + JJWT 0.12.5 + MySQL + Security + Lombok）、启动类 ExamApplication.java、以及 application.yml（MySQL 数据源、OAuth2 客户端、JWT、CORS 配置，全部支持环境变量覆盖）。
